message:
fix(session): propagate read errors during JSONL session loading instead of silently skipping

load_session_meta_jsonl previously used map_while(Result::ok) to iterate
lines, which silently swallowed IO errors (e.g., invalid UTF-8 sequences)
and stopped iteration early. This could mask corrupted session files and
produce incorrect message counts.

Replace with explicit error propagation: each line read failure now returns
a descriptive Error::session("Failed to read session entry: ...") instead
of being ignored.

Add test: test_load_session_meta_jsonl_errors_on_invalid_utf8_entry_line
verifies that a JSONL file containing 0xFF 0xFE bytes produces an error
mentioning "Failed to read session entry" rather than silently succeeding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
